title: Abraxas (Book Of Angels Volume 19)
notes:
Packaged in a Digipak with a die-cut front cover and, around the spine, a photo-illustrated black obi that includes notes.

 Recorded and mixed March 2012 at Orange Music Sound Studios, NJ

A project of Hips Road
ⒸⓅ 2012 Tzadik

videos.description:
CD RELEASE CONCERT
THE STONE - AUGUST 3, 2012 - NYC

John Zorn: ABRAXAS: Shanir Ezra Blumenkranz: #1 Domos: Masada Book Of Angels Vol. 19

Aram Bajakian - guitars
Eyal Maoz - guitars
Shanir Ezra Blumenkranz - gimbri
Kenny Grohowski - drums
